title: 'Disappointed, confused' PA Dems not supporting Fetterman in 2028
shortDescription: Pennsylvania Democrats didn't offer support Sen. John Fetterman's reelection in 2028 as they are 'disappointed' and 'disagree' with his votes.

title: White House to announce drug pricing deal with Regeneron
shortDescription: Regeneron will be the final of 17 large pharmaceutical companies to sign such a drug pricing agreement with the Trump administration.

title: Could Alexandria and Arlington, Virginia, be added to Washington DC?
shortDescription: Virginia congressman Rick McCormick introduced legislation the Make DC Square Again Act, which would add Alexandria and Arlington to Washington DC.

title: Trump, the marijuana restriction change and what to know about THC
shortDescription: As the Justice Department moves to reclassify medical marijuana products as less dangerous, we're answering your burning questions about THC.

title: Lawsuit says park service violated free speech over anti-Trump signs
shortDescription: The complaint alleged the National Park Service threatened to revoke a protest permit over signs accusing President Donald Trump of sexual misconduct.

title: Congressman David Scott dies at 80. Remembering his legacy in Atlanta
shortDescription: US House Representative David Scott died at 80 just a day after casting a vote in Washington. The Georgia politician long served the Atlanta area.

title: Senate moves ahead on Homeland Security funding
shortDescription: The Senate votes to advance a $70 billion plan to fund Homeland Security agencies including ICE in a "vote-a-rama" that lasted nearly six hours..

title: Could Georgia turn blue this election season? What polls are showing
shortDescription: Democrats are making significant gains in Georgia ahead of the primary elections in May. Could this be a new era for the Peach State?

title: Young voters squeezed by economy, distrust political systems in new poll
shortDescription: Roughly half of young Americans said they are affected by inflation, and 45% said they are struggling to make ends meet in new Harvard Youth Poll.

title: In rapid-fire votes, Senate spurns measures to lower Americans' costs
shortDescription: Senate Democrats, in a fierce political battle over immigration enforcement funding, forced Republicans to vote on measures meant to lower costs.

title: Poll: Most Americans believe Supreme Court avoids ruling against Trump
shortDescription: A new poll shows most Americans believe the Supreme Court avoids ruling against Donald Trump, despite a recent ruling against Trump's tariffs.

title: Virginia redistricting: Judge blocks maps passed by voters
shortDescription: A Virginia judge blocked the certification of the vote approving a congressional map that would give Democrats a large majority in the state's delegation.

title: House Democrats press FBI chief Kash Patel over drinking claims
shortDescription: Democrats on the House Judiciary Committee sent FBI Director Kash Patel a letter, demanding that he submit to an alcohol abuse screener.

title: Trump Navy secretary John C. Phelan resigns
shortDescription: Navy Secretary John C. Phelan resigned as the Pentagon named Hung Cao to replace him amid tensions over the Iran naval blockade.

title: David Jackson, longtime White House correspondent for USA TODAY, dies
shortDescription: Jackson covered every president from Bill Clinton to Donald Trump, and was a fixture on the campaign trail.

title: Few Americans consider President Trump as religious, survey finds
shortDescription: President Trump recently clashed with the pope. Even before that, many U.S. adults did not consider him too religious, if at all, a survey finds.

title: White House not setting deadline for Iran talks
shortDescription: The White House declined to say how long President Trump is willing to wait for Iranian negotiators to respond as peace talks stall.

title: Senate once again votes down War Powers resolution
shortDescription: The Senate voted down a resolution to end American hostilities in Iran. It was once again a largely party line vote.

title: Senate candidate says he'd push to impeach 2 Supreme Court justices
shortDescription: Maine Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner told NBC News he would seek an investigation on President Donald Trump if he's elected to office.

title: As DHS shutdown lags, Congress greenlights $70B for ICE, Border Patrol
shortDescription: Ending the Department of Homeland Security shutdown is about to get more complicated.

title: Trump claims Virginia redistricting vote was 'rigged' without evidence
shortDescription: The referendum eked out a victory by three percentage points that temporarily changes the state's boundaries for its delegation to the U.S. House.

title: Arrests at Earth Day protest outside Trump Tower
shortDescription: Climate activists demonstrating outside Trump Tower in honor of Earth Day were arrested after their sit-in blocked traffic on Fifth Avenue.
